title: View activity log across entire workspace
excerpt: As a workspace owner, I’d like to have access to the activity log for an entire workspace, so that I didn’t have to check the activity log of every board in a workspace when tracking changes across related projects/board…

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a workspace owner, I’d like to have access to the activity log for an entire workspace, so that I didn’t have to check the activity log of every board in a workspace when tracking changes across related projects/boards.

Initially reported as a question here.
